positive: Highly detailed symmetrical mandala illustration featuring intertwined constellations and celestial bodies (moons, stars, planets). The design must utilize strong linework, clean silhouettes, and geometric perfection, rendered in deep indigo, metallic gold, and emerald green. Composition should be central and radial, suitable for a chest print on apparel. Background is pure, solid black or stark white for maximum contrast. Style should be a blend of Art Nouveau engraving and sacred geometry. Ultra-detailed, vector art quality, clean lines, 8k digital illustration, perfect symmetry.
negative: blurry, low resolution, text, watermarks, artifacts, noisy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, asymmetry, low contrast, gradient, photography, logo, watermark, copyright, recognizable person, letters, words
